data.body:
## Description

Remove the issue_tracker.create_cmd config key documentation and the CREATE_CMD env var override documentation from CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md.

File: plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

1. Remove the '### issue_tracker.create_cmd' section (around line 296) — the entire section block including description, type, default, and example.

2. Remove the '### CREATE_CMD' env var override section (around line 1031) — the entire section block.

3. Keep the '### issue_tracker.search_cmd' section (around line 285) — this config key remains valid.

4. Keep the '### SEARCH_CMD' env var override section — this env var remains valid.

## No RED test required
Documentation removal has no behavioral code impact. This is a docs-only cleanup task that depends on T2 (dfa8-b07c) and T7 (fbc1-a611) having already removed the feature from code and config. Doc update follows implementation per standard dependency order.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
